prompt: Create a vertical close-up studio portrait of a young East Asian woman with warm fair skin, soft natural makeup, glossy brown eyes, and a gentle closed-mouth smile, looking directly at the viewer. She has long dark brown to black hair styled in two loose braids with wispy face-framing strands. She wears a bright sunflower yellow collared linen shirt and a wide woven straw sun hat decorated with dried wildflowers, baby's breath, small yellow blossoms, brown dried sprigs, pinecones, and one prominent sunflower on the right side of the brim. Add matching sunflower drop earrings. In the lower left foreground she holds a rustic bouquet containing exactly 6 visible element types: one large sunflower, yellow wildflowers, beige wheat stalks, dried brown stems, small pale white flowers, and pinecones. Use a rich mustard-yellow seamless background, golden-hour warmth, soft diffused portrait lighting, shallow depth of field, high-detail realistic photography, crisp facial details, natural skin texture, and harmonious monochrome yellow-brown styling. Composition should be a tight chest-up portrait, head and hat filling the upper frame, bouquet partially cropped at bottom left, with no text, no watermark, no extra people, and no distorted facial features.
promptEn: Create a vertical close-up studio portrait of a young East Asian woman with warm fair skin, soft natural makeup, glossy brown eyes, and a gentle closed-mouth smile, looking directly at the viewer. She has long dark brown to black hair styled in two loose braids with wispy face-framing strands. She wears a bright sunflower yellow collared linen shirt and a wide woven straw sun hat decorated with dried wildflowers, baby's breath, small yellow blossoms, brown dried sprigs, pinecones, and one prominent sunflower on the right side of the brim. Add matching sunflower drop earrings. In the lower left foreground she holds a rustic bouquet containing exactly 6 visible element types: one large sunflower, yellow wildflowers, beige wheat stalks, dried brown stems, small pale white flowers, and pinecones. Use a rich mustard-yellow seamless background, golden-hour warmth, soft diffused portrait lighting, shallow depth of field, high-detail realistic photography, crisp facial details, natural skin texture, and harmonious monochrome yellow-brown styling. Composition should be a tight chest-up portrait, head and hat filling the upper frame, bouquet partially cropped at bottom left, with no text, no watermark, no extra people, and no distorted facial features.
promptZh: 创作一张竖构图的影棚特写人像，主角是一位年轻的东亚女性，拥有温暖白皙的肤色、柔和的自然妆容、明亮的棕色双眸，嘴角带着温柔的闭口微笑，直视镜头。她留着深棕色至黑色的长发，编成两条松散的麻花辫，脸颊两侧留有几缕碎发。她身穿一件明亮的 向日葵黄 亚麻翻领衬衫，头戴一顶宽檐编织草帽，帽檐装饰着干野花、满天星、黄色小花、棕色干枝、松果，并在帽檐右侧点缀着一朵醒目的向日葵。佩戴配套的向日葵耳坠。在左下角前景中，她手持一束乡村风格的花束，花束中清晰可见 6 种元素：一朵大向日葵、黄色野花、米色麦穗、棕色干茎、淡白色小花以及松果。使用浓郁的芥末黄无缝背景，营造黄金时刻的暖色调，采用柔和的漫射人像布光，浅景深效果，高细节写实摄影，面部细节清晰，皮肤纹理自然，整体呈现和谐的黄棕色单色调风格。构图为紧凑的胸部以上特写，头部和帽子填满画面上方，花束在左下角部分裁切，画面中无文字、无水印、无多余人物，且无面部特征畸变。
